texto: The moonlight streaming through the sheer draperies revealed Taylor smiling, boneless and peaceful in Will's embrace. Life, love, was made up of fragile moments like these. Fragile as Paris moonlight.

texto: You think I'm with you out of guilt?""No, you ass. Of course not. I just mean—""You're a nut, MacAllister. I'm with you because I love you."There it was, out. Three little words. Had he really never said them aloud to Taylor?
